docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2012 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ARGUETA, ROSA AS TO DEFENDANT ZULETA, LIDIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARGUETA, ROSA AS TO DEFENDANT ZULETA, LIDIA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-24-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZULETA, LIDIA
SC-220 REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT ZULETA, LIDIA AS TO PLAINTIFF ARGUETA, ROSA

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RE-ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT JAMES LEONARD LEE OF JUDGMENT RECOVERY SPECIALIST REASSIGNING JUDGMENT BACK TO PLAINTIFF FILED BY ASSIGNEE LEE, JAMES LEONARD DBA JUDGMENT RECOVERY SPECIALIST AS TO DEFENDANT ZULETA, LIDIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-10-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-10-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MERCEDEZ LOPEZ--SPANISH INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARGUETA, ROSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZULETA, LIDIA $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,085.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RESPONSE TO REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENT - SC 221 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARGUETA, ROSA AS TO DEFENDANT ZULETA, LIDIA
ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS - APPROVED - JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL -
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARGUETA, ROSA PETITION MAILED ON SEP 20, 2012
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS SET FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGEMENT IS GRANTED. SIGNED BY: JUDGE PRO TEM:QUEENA HO-
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ARGUETA, ROSA ASSIGNED TO LEE, JAMES LEONARD DBA JUDGMENT RECOVERY SPECIALIST
LEE, JAMES LEONARD IS NO LONGER ASSIGNEE
